case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. HEALTHLINE MEDIA, LLC

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 76567789) TO PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. THE PARTIES HAVING SIGNED A STIPULATION FOR THE SETTLEMENT OF THIS MATTER, IT IS ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR ENTY OF JUDGMENT, PURSUANT TO THE PARTIES' STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF FINAL JUDGMENT AND PERMANENT INJUNCTION IN THIS MATTER, IS GRANTED, AND THIS COURT SHALL SIGN THE FINAL JUDGMENT AND PERMANENT INJUNCTION LODGED BY PLAINTIFF.(SEE SIGNED ORDER / JUDGMENT FOR COMPLETE RULING). JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG; CLERK: M. MACADANGDANG; NOT REPORTED. (302/GLW)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-05-2025 Off Calendar

Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation; Notice Of Motion; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Jul-28-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA's Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation.

The parties having signed a stipulation for the settlement of this matter, IT IS ORDERED that Plaintiff's Motion for Enty of Judgment, pursuant to the parties' Stipulation for Entry of Final Judgment and Permanent Injunction in this matter, is granted, and this court shall sign the Final Judgment and Permanent Injunction lodged by plaintiff.

Order and Judgment is signed.

Judge: Garrett L. Wong; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/GLW)
